info.title: WealthView.pro API
info.description: Read-only Stellar treasury intelligence infrastructure for builders and AI agents. No signing, custody, trading, authentication, or database required.

parameters.name: wallets
parameters.description: Comma or line separated Stellar G... public keys.

parameters.name: contracts
parameters.description: Optional comma or line separated SEP-41/Soroban C... contract IDs.

400.description: Validation or aggregation error with per-wallet details

get.summary: Return rule-based treasury signals from live aggregate results
Return treasury health, idle capital, alerts, benchmarks, change detection availability, executive brief, and simulation defaults
